Cecready micro-chevron for soft mattress bedding conditions

14.34 USD

Availability: In stock

Enhance your bedroom with this luxurious Cecready Bed Skirt featuring a stunning ruffle design with split corners. Perfect for hiding under your mattress, the 22-inch drop provides a sleek and even look. Machine washable and long-lasting, it's an excellent addition to your soft mattress.
Quantiy:
- +
  • Description
  • Additional information
  • Reviews
  Our Cecready Bed Skirt for Queen Size is a luxurious addition to your bedroom. Featuring a stunning micro-chevron design with split corners, it adds a touch of elegance and style. With a 22-inch drop, it effortlessly reaches the floor and hides any messes, dust, or particles that might gather underneath your bed. Machine washable and gentle on fabrics, it's perfect for everyday use.
  This Bed Skirt from Cecready is engineered to enhance your sleep environment. The split corner design ensures a neat and organized appearance while adding functionality. The 22-inch drop is generous, creating a uniform and stylish look. Easy care and durability make it a great investment for a soft and comfortable mattress bedding solution.
